file_insights.description: Replaced placeholder text with comprehensive build and run instructions section

patterns_discovered.description: Each major task documented with multiple implementation approaches (UI-based, CLI-based, automation)
examples: Building via Gradle commands or Android Studio UI
Running on emulator via Device Manager or command-line emulator startup
Installing APK via installDebug, manual installation, or pre-built APK

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent format: prerequisites → numbered steps → expected results/output
Documentation includes not just commands but explanations of build variants, output locations, and when to use each approach

gotchas_discovered.description: Device default 'Charging only' mode will not allow ADB connection; must explicitly select File Transfer, PTP, or USB Tethering
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Document USB mode selection requirement in device connection steps

gotchas_discovered.description: Computer must be authorized on device via prompt dialog; missing this step causes 'unauthorized' status
Initial emulator startup can take 30-60 seconds, may cause user confusion if not documented
Emulator performance depends on platform-specific acceleration (HAXM, Hypervisor, KVM) that must be installed separately
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Prerequisites section mentions hardware acceleration requirement

coverage: Debug and release build variants explained and distinguished
Multiple build methods documented (Gradle, Android Studio UI)
Emulator setup and execution covered in detail
Physical device setup with all prerequisites and steps
quality_indicators: Includes expected outputs and results validation
Uses visual aids (tables, code blocks, formatting)
Covers both happy path and error scenarios

recommendations.suggestion: Add dedicated Troubleshooting subsection for common issues (device not detected, build failures, installation errors)
recommendations.reasoning: Current guide references troubleshooting but doesn't provide solutions

recommendations.suggestion: Add section on code signing certificate management and renewal for release builds
recommendations.reasoning: Release signing is mentioned but certificate lifecycle management is not covered

recommendations.suggestion: Link to Android Studio documentation versions for API level compatibility matrix
recommendations.reasoning: API level selection important but external reference would improve maintainability

recommendations.suggestion: Consider separate section for performance profiling and optimization workflows specific to release builds
recommendations.reasoning: Current guide covers build creation but not post-build analysis
